apiProperties.summary: Multi-perspective analysis engine for Copilot Studio
apiProperties.description: Provides comprehensive decision support through alternative perspectives, risk analysis, cognitive bias detection, and comparative reasoning. Exposes analytical tools and knowledge-base resources for both primary and secondary models in Copilot Studio.
